name: tickhelp
description: Comprehensive ticket management system - DEVE427 Educational Project

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:frontend && npm run test:coverage:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:frontend && npm run lint:fix:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run docker:up && timeout 10 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed

author: EPSI SN2 Team
